step_rationale: MI biomarker; decreased content predicts HF post-MI; links myocardial injury and systemic inflammation.
mechanism: Decreased LPC (18:2) content post-MI reflects myocardial injury, phospholipase-A2 activation, and inflammatory lipid mediator generation.

references.title: Lipidomic analyses reveal potential biomarkers for predicting death and heart failure after acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry

references.title: Improvement of myocardial infarction risk prediction via inflammation-associated metabolite biomarkers.
